items.caption: An educational slide with a cartoon theme, illustrating the concept of tracking information in the meat industry. it features a cow with a tag on its ear, symbolizing identification and tracking. to the right, there's a graphic of a piece of meat with a number on it, indicating the meat's identification. below the graphics, there's a photograph of a meat processing facility, showing carcasses hanging on hooks. the text on the slide explains that a number or reference code is used to link the meat to its animal of origin, emphasizing the importance of tracking information in the meat industry.
